message:
Rename FrankenError::Interrupt to FrankenError::Abort across btree, error, and vdbe crates

Cancellation checkpoints in the btree cursor and VDBE engine now
return FrankenError::Abort instead of FrankenError::Interrupt, and
the vtab helper that propagates cancellation errors matches on the
new variant. All corresponding test assertions are updated to expect
Abort, aligning the error semantics with the ErrorCode::Abort wire
code rather than the former Interrupt mapping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
